title: Another Boost for British Car Industry as Â£1 Billion Secured for New Sunderland Gigafactory
content:
The new AESC gigafactory will manufacture batteries for electric vehicles, powering up to 100,000 EVs each year - a six-fold increase on the countryâ€™s current capacity. In the landmark transaction, the National Wealth Fund and UK Export Finance will provide financial guarantees which unlock Â£680 million in financing from banks including Standard Chartered, HSBC, SMBC Group, Societe Generale and BBVA. This will cover construction and operation of the new plant. The remaining Â£320 million has been secured through private financing in addition to new equity provided by AESC.

In addition to this Â£1 billion investment, the Governmentâ€™s Automotive Transformation Fund is also investing Â£150 million in grant funding.
author: Vineeth Chellakannu
